html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly

Fanged BumperFanged Bumper Kit

The Fanged Bumper Kit is a craftable Item in the Offerings filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Year of the Dragonfly event. It requires 3 Lucky Gold Nugget to craft. Used to strengthen the raft by installing a bumper on the edge of the vessel. It has 40 durability, which provides a small protection for the raft from collision damage. If it is damaged and not destroyed, the player can use Twigs to repair it.

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
Fanged BumperFanged Bumper Kit
“When you mess with a dragon boat, you get the horns!”
–Wilson, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Alright, a boat with teeth is kinda cool.”
–Willow, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Eep! Oh, is not monster, just Wolfgang's boat.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“My boat is baring its teeth.”
–Wendy, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“I FEEL BETTER WHEN I'M SURROUNDED BY POINTED OBJECTS”
–WX-78, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“The effect is admittedly quite striking.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Everyone will be givin' this boat a wide berth alright.”
–Woodie, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“I always thought boats could use more teeth.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“A fearsome defense indeed!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Now our boat has fangs too!”
–Webber, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Ferocious!”
–Warly, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Thank you for keeping Floaty safe!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Wouldn't wanna end up on the business end of those fangs.”
–Winona, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Ever been bitten by a boat before?”
–Wortox, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Grrr! Boat gonna bite you!”
–Wurt, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“Neat! Are those real dragon claws?”
–Walter, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“I wouldn't like to be the one bumping into those horns.”
–Wanda, when examining a Fanged Bumper
“A soon-to-be boat bumper.”
–Wilson, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“I guess building some bumpers is better than sinking.”
–Willow, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“Will keep boat safe.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“I suppose I should make myself useful.”
–Wendy, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“FOR BUILDING AN... ACCEPTABLE BUMPER”
–WX-78, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“It would be wise to equip the boat with a protective barrier.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“A bit of padding might be a good idea.”
–Woodie, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“Ugh. These menial tasks do not suit me.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“It shall shield my vessel from harm.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“Now we can play bumper boats!”
–Webber, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“I will feel a bit safer with an extra layer wrapped around my boat.”
–Warly, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“Will help protect Floaty”
–Wormwood, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“Extra protection's always good, 'specially on water.”
–Winona, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“But idle hands are such good playthings!”
–Wortox, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“Gonna decorate boat, florp.”
–Wurt, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“It's always best to be prepared!”
–Walter, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
“It'll make me feel slightly safer at sea. Slightly.”
–Wanda, when examining a Fanged Bumper Kit
The Fanged Bumper Kit is a craftable Item in the Offerings filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Year of the Dragonfly event. It requires 3 Lucky Gold Nugget to craft. Used to strengthen the raft by installing a bumper on the edge of the vessel. It has 40 durability, which provides a small protection for the raft from collision damage. If it is damaged and not destroyed, the player can use Twigs to repair it.

The '''Fanged Bumper Kit''' is a craftable [[:Category:Items|Item]] in the Offerings filter, exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[Year of the Dragonfly]]'' event. It requires 3 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]] to craft. Used to strengthen the raft by installing a bumper on the edge of the vessel. It has 40 durability, which provides a small protection for the raft from collision damage. If it is damaged and not destroyed, the player can use [[Twigs]] to repair it.
